_meta.voice: Direct American English. Food-delivery brand voice: warm, brand-forward, no jargon. Preserves all stock alt-text strings as-is (those are upstream content issues, not translation issues).

strings.1 розробка айдентики · 2 напрями роботи:: 1 identity build · 2 work streams: site + menu · 5 key sections: menu, delivery, about the brand, blog, contacts · 3 commercial accents: promotions, benefits, CTA
strings.Bravo — бренд доставки страв на мангалі: Bravo is a grill-food delivery brand in Brovary. We built the website with a conversion-driven marketing structure and the menu design as a separate visual asset — so the site and the menu work as one system: clear dish presentation, featured deals, delivery terms, and a short path to ordering. For a food business this isn't a business-card site — it's full digital packaging for the brand.
strings.Bravo — сайт і дизайн меню для бренду до: Bravo — website and menu design for a food-delivery brand
strings.Бренду потрібна була зрозуміла digital-п: The brand needed a clear digital presentation for food delivery
strings.Головна задача — створити єдину систему:: The core task — build one system: website, menu, visual presentation, and a path to ordering
strings.Для food-бізнесу важливо одразу показати: For a food business it's critical to show dishes, promotions, delivery terms, and benefits up front
strings.Додали CTA «Зробити замовлення» і «Перег: Added "Order now" and "View the menu" CTAs at the key page levels
strings.Додали сторінку «Про нас» для підсилення: Added an "About us" page to reinforce brand trust
strings.Користувач має швидко перейти від першог: The user should jump from the first screen straight to the menu
strings.Окремо потрібно було розробити дизайн ме: We also needed a separate menu design that holds the brand style
strings.Оформили блок акційних товарів для просу: Built a deals block to promote the priority items
strings.Передбачили блог як SEO інструмент: Set up the blog as an SEO tool
strings.Побудували першу сторінку як продаючу ст: Built the first page as a sales structure: a strong first screen with a CTA, deals, a benefits block, and a hop to the menu
strings.Продумали сторінку умов доставки з ключо: Designed the delivery-terms page with the key info a customer needs
strings.Розробили блок переваг бренду: швидка до: Built the brand-benefits block: fast delivery, clean cooking, free delivery
strings.Розробили дизайн меню як окремий візуаль: Designed the menu as a separate brand visual asset
strings.Розробили сайт для бренду доставки їжі: Built a site for a food-delivery brand
strings.Сайт мав працювати не як проста візитка,: The site had to work as an ordering tool, not a plain business card
strings.Сайт супер! Дякуємо\nНапишіть мені, і я:
The site rocks! Thank you.
Message me — I'll feed you the best shawarma in town, on the house!
strings.Створили окрему сторінку меню з усіма ст: Built a dedicated menu page with every dish
strings.ключових розділів: меню, доставка, про б: key sections: menu, delivery, about the brand, blog, contacts

sections[_key==\"sec6\"].bodyEn: For a food business, just showing dishes isn't enough. The user has to quickly grasp what's on offer, why it's convenient, how delivery works, and where to tap to place an order. The brand also needed more than a website — a menu design that holds the same visual language.
sections[_key==\"sec9\"].bodyEn: We built the site and the menu design for the food-delivery brand. The site is structured as a conversion path where every block points the user toward the menu or an order. The menu design carries the same visual language as the site.
sections[_key==\"sech\"].bodyEn: Bravo got more than a website — full digital packaging for a food business. The site shows the brand's offering, deals, and benefits up front, then walks the user to the menu and the order. The menu design holds the same visual language and makes the brand's communication feel coherent — online and offline.
